## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed (GPG or SSH)
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude/Copilot/AI` trailers
- [ ] No new secrets, hostnames, or `.env` content
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest` / `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest` / `dotnet test` / etc.)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behaviour or public API changed
- [ ] Disclaimer in `LICENSE` still applies (no live-order code)
